scriptText:
[[STAGING]]
[[PRODUCTION]]
Featuring: Me as Mark, Robert (AI Actor)
Video Model: Dreamina Seedance 2.0 [Early Access]
Technique: Reference-to-Video (R2V) / Omni-Reference
Prompting: Auteur/Screenplay Prompting [Global + Lookbook + Script]
Production Date: 17 February 2026
[[/PRODUCTION]]
[[/STAGING]]

I. KINETIC ZEN

[[STAGING]]
[[GLOBAL]]
Generate intense action battle scene following the provided screenplay. Ensure the result is cinematic, with strong composition and framing.
[[/GLOBAL]]
[[LOOKBOOK]]
The Aesthetic: Kinetic Symmetry. A high-contrast, center-weighted clash between urban modernity and traditional landscape.
Theme/Intention: To showcase the jarring transition from grounded physical combat to gravity-defying supernatural manipulation.
Location: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden, Tokyo. A specific vista where the traditional Taiwantei Pavilion is framed perfectly against the backdrop of the NTT Docomo Yoyogi Building.
Time: LATE AFTERNOON (Golden Hour).
Lighting: Harsh, direct sunlight creating long, geometric shadows. Warm 4500K color temperature with high-key fill from the sky. No artificial bounce.
Sound Atmosphere: THE WIND HOWLS in sudden bursts. The rhythmic CLACK of dress shoes on stone vs. the muffled THUD of sneakers on grass. High-frequency metallic SHEATHING sounds.
Key Props/Set Pieces: Robert’s Glock 17 (Matte Black), fallen Cherry Blossom petals (Sakura) that react to the air manipulation.
Continuity State: Robert’s suit jacket is unbuttoned; Mark’s hoodie is slightly singed at the cuff.
CHARACTER
@Image1 (Robert): Slim-fit charcoal Italian suit, crisp white button-down with a slim black tie. Hair is side-parted and gelled. A concealed Kydex holster is visible at the small of his back.
@Image2 (Mark): Oversized cream-colored heavyweight hoodie, baggy light-wash denim jeans, and scuffed white canvas sneakers. Messy, unstyled "bed-head" hair. He looks entirely unassuming, like a passing student.
Safety/VFX Notes: Wirework for Mark’s "air-stepping." High-speed fans for localized wind displacement. Minimal shimmer VFX for air ripples (distortion only, no glow).
[[/LOOKBOOK]]
[[/STAGING]]

EXT. SHINJUKU GYOEN - DAY

[SHOT 1: WS - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN, TRACKING]
Robert and Mark are centered, sprinting toward each other on the grass. The skyscraper is dead-center behind them.

[SHOT 2: MS - EYE LEVEL, WHIP PAN, HANDHELD]
M1: Robert throws a low-line kick. Mark steps onto the air, his foot landing six inches above the ground with a visible ripple.

[SHOT 3: CU - LOW ANGLE, HANDHELD]
RAPID CUT: Mark’s sneaker striking the air like it’s solid stone. A THUD echoes.

[SHOT 4: MS - EYE LEVEL, TRACKING, HANDHELD]
M2: Close combat. Robert delivers a three-hit combo. Mark deflects with open-palm air bursts that SHUDDER the camera.

[SHOT 5: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
RAPID CUT: Robert’s glove grabbing Mark’s hoodie.

[SHOT 6: MS - HIGH ANGLE, TILT, HANDHELD]
M3: Mark exhales. A localized cyclone erupts between them, BLASTING Robert backward ten feet.

[SHOT 7: WS - EYE LEVEL, PULL-OUT, TRACKING]
R1: Mark "runs" upward into the sky, his feet finding invisible steps. Robert slides to a halt and reaches for his holster.

[SHOT 8: CU - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN, SHOULDER RIG]
Robert draws the Glock. He doesn't aim; he reacts. The gun levels.

[SHOT 9: MS - LOW ANGLE, TRACKING, HANDHELD]
Mark is now 10 feet in the air, looking down. He looks bored.

[SHOT 10: CU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
Robert FIRES. The slide cycles with a metallic CLACK.

[SHOT 11: MS - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN, HANDHELD]
R2: The bullet travels. In front of Mark's face, the air hardens into a shimmering concave lens. The bullet STOPS mid-air, spinning against the air-shield.

[SHOT 12: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
The bullet deforms, flattening against the invisible barrier before dropping like a stone.

[SHOT 13: MS - HIGH ANGLE, TILT, HANDHELD]
Mark swipes his hand downward. A blade of high-pressure air SPREADS the grass apart in a straight line toward Robert.

[SHOT 14: WS - EYE LEVEL, WHIP PAN, TRACKING]
M4: Robert dives to the left, rolling over a stone bench as the air-blade SHATTERS the wood where he just stood.

[SHOT 15: MS - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN, TRACKING]
Final beat. Robert stands, gun ready. Mark hovers, gravity-defiant. They are perfectly framed on opposite sides of a stone lantern.

II. CONCRETE TIDES

[[STAGING]]
[[GLOBAL]]
Generate intense action battle scene following the provided screenplay. Ensure the result is cinematic, with strong composition and framing.
The scene is established in a minimalist "Sunken Gallery" where the interior architecture fuses Seoul’s brutalist concrete, Japanese Zen rock placements, and New York’s floor-to-ceiling industrial glass overlooking a rainy skyline. The floor is a shallow, 2-inch deep reflective pool of recirculating water. Robert and Mark begin centered in this pool, exactly three feet apart. Robert’s suppressed Glock 19 has been kicked to the edge of the frame, ten feet away. The spatial logic dictates that any movement by Mark will ripple the water surface, providing the source material for his defense before Robert can reach his weapon.
[[/GLOBAL]]
[[LOOKBOOK]]
SCENE: The Sunken Gallery - Water Combat
The Aesthetic: High-contrast Noir-Tech. Brutalist architecture meets fluid motion.
Theme/Intention: The shock of the supernatural disrupting professional precision.
Location: An indoor minimalist penthouse with a continuous shallow water floor.
Time: DUSK (Blue hour light bleeding through rain-streaked windows).
Lighting: Natural "Blue Hour" light from the left; warm low-K tungsten practicals.
Sound Atmosphere: Rhythmic splashing, heavy breathing, and the metallic clatter of a sliding pistol.
Key Props/Set Pieces: Robert’s Glock 19, architectural water feature.
CHARACTER
@image1 Robert: Charcoal tech-fabric trench coat, tactical turtleneck. Hair: Blonde, sharp military-grade undercut.
@image2 Mark: Oversized heavy-cotton cream hoodie, baggy indigo denim. Hair: Salt-and-pepper, textured shaggy bowl cut.
[[/LOOKBOOK]]
[[/STAGING]]

INT. SUNKEN GALLERY - DUSK

[SHOT 1: WS - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
Robert and Mark are locked in a grapple in the center of the water-covered floor. Rain lashes against the New York skyline behind them.

[SHOT 2: CU - LOW ANGLE, PUSH-IN]
Robert’s boots CRUNCH against the shallow water as he drives a knee toward Mark’s midsection.

[SHOT 3: ECU - EYE LEVEL, SHAKY HANDHELD]
Mark’s face. He GRUNTS. His eyes remain calm, almost detached.

[SHOT 4: MS - EYE LEVEL, PAN (4 FRAMES)] 
Robert throws a rapid-fire jab-cross combo. Mark parries with his forearms.

[SHOT 5: CU - LOW ANGLE, TILT UP (4 FRAMES)]
Robert’s fist connects with Mark’s palm. The WATER under their feet ripples outward violently.

[SHOT 6: MS - HIGH ANGLE, TRACKING (4 FRAMES)]
Robert executes a sweep kick. Mark leaps vertically, hovering for a split second longer than physics should allow.

[SHOT 7: CU - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN]

ROBERT:
(Strained)
Stay down!

[SHOT 8: ECU - LOW ANGLE, STATIC]
Mark’s hand dips toward the water surface. His fingers curl like a conductor’s.

[SHOT 9: CU - EYE LEVEL, FAST PAN (4 FRAMES)]
The floor water RISING in a thin, sharp crescent moon shape behind Mark.

[SHOT 10: MS - EYE LEVEL, DOLLY SIDEWAYS]
Robert lunges for his pistol on the floor. His hand is inches away.

[SHOT 11: ECU - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN (4 FRAMES)]
A whip of water SNAPS out, wrapping around Robert’s wrist. Robert's face shifts to pure shock.

[SHOT 12: MS - EYE LEVEL, TRACKING (4 FRAMES)]
Mark stands upright, his movements fluid. He thrusts both palms forward.

[SHOT 13: WS - LOW ANGLE, PULL-OUT]
A massive wall of floor-water surges forward, HITTING Robert like a physical RAM.

[SHOT 14: CU - EYE LEVEL, DUTCH ANGLE (4 FRAMES)]
Robert is THROWN backward, sliding across the concrete toward the glass wall.

[SHOT 15: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]

MARK:
(Breathless exhale)
...Enough.

[SHOT 16: WS - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
The two face off across the expanse. Mark stands in the center, several spheres of water orbiting his hands. Robert recovers, realization dawning as he stares at the floating liquid.

III. TIME STEP

[[STAGING]]
[[GLOBAL]]
Generate intense action battle scene following the provided screenplay. Ensure the result is cinematic, with strong composition and framing.
[[/GLOBAL]]
[[LOOKBOOK]]
The Aesthetic: Symmetric Suspension. A transition from violent, chaotic motion to a surgically precise, frozen tableau.
Theme/Intention: To demonstrate the technological superiority of the "Spy" over the raw elemental power of the "Meta-human."
Location: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden – Near the Kyu-Goryo-Tei (Taiwan Pavilion). A perfect intersection of water, manicured pines, and the distant steel skyscrapers.
Time: GOLDEN HOUR (The sun is a low, orange disc clipping the building edges).
Lighting: Warm, long-shadowed high-contrast lighting. A lens flare "washes" the frame during the chaotic beats, then disappears during the "Time-Slow" beat.
Sound Atmosphere: THE DEAFENING ROAR of wind suddenly cuts to a REVERBERATING TICK of a mechanical watch. High-frequency silence. The "THUD" of a final impact.
Key Props/Set Pieces: Robert’s silver Chronograph watch (Custom spy tech), a stone bridge, floating cherry blossom petals.
Continuity State: Robert’s Glock is empty (slide locked back). Mark is 15 feet in the air.
@Image1 Robert: Charcoal suit, now slightly dusty. Silver watch glints on his left wrist. Face remains emotionless.
@Image2 Mark: Hoodie billowing aggressively. His hands are glowing slightly from the pressure of the air he is condensing.
Safety/VFX Notes: Wire-rigging for Mark’s suspension. Speed-ramping (Normal -> High FPS -> Normal). Digital air-distortion for the time-warp bubble.
[[/LOOKBOOK]]
[[/STAGING]]

EXT. SHINJUKU GYOEN - DAY

[SHOT 1: WS - EYE LEVEL, WHIP PAN, HANDHELD]
M1: Mark thrusts both palms down. A massive PRESSURE WAVE shatters the stone path, sending gravel flying toward the camera.

[SHOT 2: MS - LOW ANGLE, TRACKING, SHOULDER RIG]
M2: Robert dives, the gravel WHIZZING past his head. He tries to fire his Glock—CLICK. The slide is locked back. Empty.

[SHOT 3: CU - HIGH ANGLE, PUSH-IN, HANDHELD]
Mark smiles. He "walks" higher into the sky, his feet crunching the air like dry snow. He prepares a finishing gust.

[SHOT 4: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
RAPID CUT: Robert’s left thumb reaches for the side-button of his silver watch.

[SHOT 5: CU - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN, TRACKING]
RAPID CUT: Mark’s hands. The air between them is warping into a sphere of lethal pressure.

[SHOT 6: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
RAPID CUT: Robert CLICKS the watch button. A metallic "TICK" echoes.

[SHOT 7: WS - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, TRIPOD]
R1: The "Time-Slow" effect. The world turns a desaturated hue. The flying gravel and swirling leaves FREEZE mid-air. Mark is stuck in his "stepping" pose, 15 feet up.

[SHOT 8: MS - EYE LEVEL, TRACKING, GIMBAL]
Robert moves at normal speed while the world is frozen. He runs toward a frozen air-step Mark left behind.

[SHOT 9: CU - LOW ANGLE, PUSH-IN, GIMBAL]
Robert’s black leather shoes step onto the "frozen" air ripple. It holds his weight. He begins his own ascent.

[SHOT 10: MS - EYE LEVEL, PAN, GIMBAL]
Robert reaches Mark’s level. He is inches away from Mark’s frozen, focused face. Robert pulls back his fist.

[SHOT 11: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
RAPID CUT: Robert’s watch face. The gears are spinning backward at high speed.

[SHOT 12: CU - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN, SHOULDER RIG]
Robert punches. At the moment of impact, he clicks the watch again.

[SHOT 13: MS - EYE LEVEL, WHIP PAN, HANDHELD]
M3: TIME SNAPS BACK. The wind ROARS back to life. Robert’s fist connects with Mark’s jaw with a sickening CRACK.

[SHOT 14: WS - EYE LEVEL, PULL-OUT, TRACKING]
M4: Mark is launched backward by the momentum, his air-shield SHATTERING like glass. He falls 15 feet and slams into the manicured lawn.

[SHOT 15: MS - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN, STATIC]
Final frame. Robert lands gracefully on the grass, perfectly centered. He adjusts his tie and checks his watch. In the background, Mark lies face down, unconscious. The garden is silent.

IV. THE TWO SEAS

[[STAGING]]
[[GLOBAL]]
Generate intense action battle scene following the provided screenplay. Ensure the result is cinematic, with strong composition and framing.
[[/GLOBAL]]
[[LOOKBOOK]]
The Aesthetic: Ottoman-Zen Symmetry. High-speed, kinetic action within a rigid, centered frame.
Theme/Intention: Discipline vs. Instinct.
Location: THE PAVILION OF THE TWO SEAS. A Kyoto-style wooden veranda overlooking a Turkish Shadirvan (ablution fountain) set in white raked gravel.
Time: DAY - High Noon.
Lighting: Harsh, direct natural light. High-contrast, deep shadows.
Sound Atmosphere: Dry, rhythmic foley. Sharp metallic "shings," heavy gravel crunches, and the "viscous weight" of moving water. No music.
Key Props: Tanto blade, 9mm pistol, stone fountain.
Continuity: Mid-engagement.
CHARACTER
@Image1 Robert: Slim charcoal-gray Turkish mohair suit, black turtleneck. High-fade undercut. Tactical leather gloves.
@Image2 Mark: Oversized cream linen tunic, navy Japanese "tobi" trousers. Barefoot. Messy, chin-length hair. Nazar-boncuk (evil eye) bead on wrist.
[[/LOOKBOOK]]
[[/STAGING]]

EXT. THE BLUE TILE GARDEN - DAY

[SHOT 1: WS - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, CENTERED COMPOSITION]
Robert and Mark stand perfectly centered in the frame. Robert lunges forward.

[SHOT 2: MS - EYE LEVEL, TRACKING SIDEWAYS, PLANIMETRIC]
Robert throws a rapid series of punches. Mark parries, his linen tunic snapping with every move.

[SHOT 3: CU - LOW ANGLE, PANS, SYMMETRICAL]
Robert draws a TANTO BLADE. The camera pans with the arc of the steel.

[SHOT 4: MS - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN, ACTION M2]
Mark ducks a horizontal slash. The blade cuts a wooden pillar behind him.
SFX: WOOD SPLINTERING.

[SHOT 5: CU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, CENTERED]
Robert’s face. Pure focus. He pivots for a roundhouse kick.

[SHOT 6: CU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, CENTERED]
Mark’s face. Calm. He catches the kick with his forearm.

[SHOT 7: MS - EYE LEVEL, TRACKING BACK, ACTION M3]
Robert pushes off and creates distance. He reaches for his holster.

[SHOT 8: WS - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, PLANIMETRIC]
Robert draws his pistol. Mark stands by the stone fountain, perfectly centered.

[SHOT 9: CU - EYE LEVEL, QUICK TILT UP, DISCOVERY R1]
Mark’s hand gestures upward. A thick ribbon of water leaps from the fountain.

[SHOT 10: MS - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, CENTERED]
The water coils around Mark’s torso like a transparent snake.

[SHOT 11: CU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, CENTERED]
Robert’s pistol muzzle. It fires.
SFX: MUZZLE BLAST.

[SHOT 12: MS - EYE LEVEL, RAPID PAN, ACTION M2]
The water ribbon snaps into a flat, vertical shield in front of Mark.

[SHOT 13: CU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, CENTERED]
The bullet hits the water shield. The water ripples violently but doesn't break.
SFX: DULLED IMPACT.

[SHOT 14: MS - EYE LEVEL, TRACKING ARC, ACTION M3]
Mark sweeps his arm. The water shield—with the bullet still inside—swings toward Robert like a heavy bat.

[SHOT 15: WS - EYE LEVEL, STATIC, SYMMETRICAL]
Robert dives to the side. The water hits a tiled wall, shattering into a thousand droplets. Robert reloads. Mark resets his stance.
SFX: MECHANICAL RELOAD.

V. BRUTAL EARTH

[[STAGING]]
[[GLOBAL]]
Generate intense action battle scene following the provided screenplay. Ensure the result is cinematic, with strong composition and framing.

The sequence takes place in a minimalist "Neo-Goryeo" atrium in Midtown Manhattan—a brutalist concrete space softened by Japanese Zen rock gardens and Korean latticed wood (Dancheong-inspired) ceilings. Robert and Mark begin the sequence locked in a clinch in the center of a dry pebble garden, 1 meter apart. The periphery is clear of debris except for a single large monolith stone 5 meters behind Mark and a wall of floor-to-ceiling windows to the West, flooding the scene with harsh, low-angle natural golden light.
[[/GLOBAL]]
[[LOOKBOOK]]
SCENE: The Atrium Standoff
The Aesthetic: Brutalist Zen. High-contrast naturalism.
Theme/Intention: The collision of trained discipline (Spy) vs. raw elemental nature (Superpower).
Location: High-end gallery/atrium blend (NYC Architecture + Kyoto Minimalism).
Time: LATE AFTERNOON (Golden Hour).
Lighting: Harsh side-lighting from floor-to-ceiling windows. High shadows, warm 3000K natural glow.
Sound Atmosphere: CRACKING stone, heavy breathing, sharp metallic slides of a handgun, and the whistling of displaced air.
Key Props/Set Pieces: Slate floor tiles, Zen garden pebbles, Robert’s tactical 9mm.
Continuity State: Dust suspended in light beams; Robert’s suit is slightly dusty from the initial struggle.
VFX Notes: Physical debris (practical) augmented by subtle VFX for "Earth-bending" floor ripples. No glowing auras.
CHARACTER
@Image1 Robert: Midnight-navy "tech-tailored" suit (Acronym-style functionality). Hair is a tight, military-grade side-part. Wears a slim tactical earpiece.
@Image2 Mark: Oversized sand-colored heavy cotton hoodie, charcoal grey cargo pants, and beat-up "fragment" sneakers. Hair is a messy, textured Korean "comma" undercut.
[[/LOOKBOOK]]
[[/STAGING]]

INT. NEO-GORYEO ATRIUM - DUSK

[SHOT 1: CU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
Robert’s forearm presses against Mark’s throat. Robert’s teeth are clenched.

[SHOT 2: CU - LOW ANGLE, PUSH-IN]
Mark’s eyes remain eerily calm. He isn’t breathing hard.

[SHOT 3: MS - EYE LEVEL, HANDHELD]
Robert throws a sharp elbow strike. Mark deflects it with a palm, the impact sounding like two stones COLLIDING.

MARK:
(Gutural grunt)
Ugh!

[SHOT 4: ECU - LOW ANGLE, STATIC]
Mark’s right foot slides back, grinding into the slate floor. The stone CRACKS under his sneaker.

[SHOT 5: WS - HIGH ANGLE, TILT]
The floor tiles beneath them RIPPLE like water. Robert loses his footing.

[SHOT 6: MS - EYE LEVEL, TRACKING]
A wave of earth surges upward. Robert is launched backward 10 feet. He performs a tactical roll.

[SHOT 7: CU - EYE LEVEL, PULL-OUT]
Robert slides to a stop on one knee. His hand reaches for his waistband.

[SHOT 8: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
Robert’s hand grips the textured handle of a sleek, black semi-automatic pistol.

[SHOT 9: MS - EYE LEVEL, PUSH-IN]
Robert levels the weapon.

ROBERT:
(Strained)
Stay down!

[SHOT 10: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
Mark raises a single hand, fingers spread wide.

[SHOT 11: WS - LOW ANGLE, PAN]
Robert fires. MUZZLE FLASH illuminates the dust. The SLATE TILES in front of Mark rip from the floor, hovering in a vertical shield.

[SHOT 12: CU - EYE LEVEL, HANDHELD]
The bullet embeds into the hovering stone with a sharp SPARK.

[SHOT 13: ECU - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
Robert’s eyes widen. He realizes the scale of the threat.

[SHOT 14: WS - EYE LEVEL, STATIC]
Robert stands 15 meters away, gun aimed. Mark stands behind his floating stone shield. The sun sets behind them, casting long, jagged shadows across the broken atrium floor.
